channel.title: V2ray on Xizi's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in V2ray on Xizi's Blog

item.title: V2ray免流教程
item.description: V2ray服务端的搭建配置 bash <(curl -L https://raw.githubusercontent.com/XTLS/Xray-install/main/install-release.sh) 免流的方案：VMess协议 + TCP + HTTP，编辑配置文件/usr/local/etc/xray/config

item.title: V2ray安装配置VMess、VLESS、XTLS教程
item.description: 近期更新重点 V2Ray v4.27.0+新增支持VLESS新协议 V2Ray v4.29.0+新增支持XTLS新协议 VMess AEAD will be used when alterId is 0 in V2Ray v4.28.0+ 安装脚本放废弃go.s
